'''''The New Jedi Order Sourcebook''''' is a sourcebook for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in February [[2002]].

The book covers information related to the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'' series]] from ''[[Vector Prime]]'' through ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''.

==Contents==
*Introduction
*Chapter One: Prologue to Destruction
**The [[Yuuzhan Vong]]
**State of [[The galaxy/Legends|the Galaxy]]
**Revised Yuuzhan Vong
*Chapter Two: ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]''
**[[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]] and [[Osarian]]
**[[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]]
**[[Helska IV]]
**A Partial Yuuzhan Vong Glossary
**[[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]]
**[[Kyp's Dozen|The Dozen-and-Two Avengers]]
**[[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]]
**[[Battle of Dubrillion|The Battle of Dubrillion]]
**The First Casualty
**Adventure Ideas
*Chapter Three: [[Dark Tide duology|''Dark Tide'']]
**New Republic Reaction
**[[Jedi academy|The Jedi Academy]]
**Belkadan under the Yuuzhan Vong
**[[Bimmiel/Legends|Bimmiel]]
**[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]
**[[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|The Battle of Dantooine]]
**Prestige Class: [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] Bodyguard
**Yuuzhan Vong Forces
**Losses on the Rim
**The [[Battle of Ithor]]
**Duel, Betrayal, and Blame
**Adventure Ideas
*Chapter Four: [[Agents of Chaos Duology|''Agents of Chaos'']]
**State of the New Republic
**[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] Grief
**Progress of the Invasion
**[[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]]
**The Yuuzhan Vong [[Elan|Defector]]
**[[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]]
**[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]
**''[[Queen of Empire]]''
**[[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]]
**[[Tynna/Legends|Tynna]]
**[[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]]
**[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
**The [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapan]] Fleet
**Swirls of Chaos
**Adventure Ideas
*Chapter Five: ''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''
**State of the New Republic
**Progress of the Invasion
**The Bloody Push to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
**[[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]
**[[Duro/Legends|Duro]]
**The [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]]
**The Rescue of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]
**The Fall of Duro
*Chapter Six: [[Edge of Victory Duology|''Edge of Victory'']]
**State of the New Republic
**Progress of the Invasion
**The [[Invasion of Yavin 4]]
**[[Anakin Solo|Anakin]] Among the Yuuzhan Vong
**Meditating on the Yuuzhan Vong
**Escape from Yavin 4
**Aboard ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]''
**Shelter
**The Truce Unravels
**Yuuzhan Vong [[Jeedai heresy|Dissension]]
**The Secret of Yuuzhan Vong Biotech
**Adventure Ideas
*Chapter Seven: ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''
**State of the New Republic
**Progress of the Invasion
**[[Eclipse Station|Eclipse]]
**[[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]
**Refugee Ships
**A Delivery to Coruscant
**Trouble in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]]
**XJ3 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-Wing]]
**New Starship Tactics
**[[YVH 1|Yuuzhan Vong Hunter War Droids]]
**[[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]
**Anakin's [[Myrkr strike team|Strike Force]]
**[[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]]
**The Final Assault Begins
**The Fate of [[Anakin Solo]]
**The [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]
**The Fall of Coruscant
**The Twins Divided
**Adventure Ideas
*Chapter Eight: Epilogue
**Coruscant Lost
**The [[Solo twins|Solo Twins]]
**[[Tsavong Lah]]'s Victory
**New Hopes
